title: eleusine cruciata
intro: Eleusine cruciata, also known as finger grass or finger millet, is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family and is commonly found in tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Eleusine cruciata include its ability to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of consuming Eleusine cruciata include its potential to reduce blood sugar levels, lower cholesterol, and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, Eleusine cruciata is often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
